short: Majority voting over k=15 noisy samplers beats a single sampler on the 300-question synthetic QA benchmark.
falsifiable_form: On the seeded benchmark (300 questions, seed 20260702), acc(vote@15) - acc(single sampler) >= 3 percentage points, with paired-bootstrap CI95 excluding 0, under passing positive and negative controls.
kill_criteria: delta <= 0 under the preregistered protocol on audit-clean code, or two consecutive INSUFFICIENT verdicts after the harness has passed adversarial audit.
